author: Harsha Nanda
text: 2026-04-30 plan update: Graphify was installed and run locally against Forge in deterministic AST mode. Treat Graphify as an optional /forge map-codebase provider/extension candidate, not v3.0 core scope. Generated local graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md, graph.json, graph.html for evaluation.

author: Harsha Nanda
text: Wave 0 verification spikes completed on branch codex/w0-verification-spikes. Evidence/docs: docs/work/2026-05-05-w0-verification-spikes/evidence.md. Checks: patch anchor bench 4% orphan (<10%); config race bench 2% manual resolve (<5%); bun test test/spikes/w0-verification-spikes.test.js passed; targeted eslint scripts/spikes test/spikes exited 0. forge-2si5 impact: Cursor parity feasible via .cursor/rules/*.mdc + AGENTS.md; Codex custom slash prompt file parity not primary-source supported, so parity should target Codex skills/instructions rather than undocumented slash prompt files.

author: Harsha Nanda
text: Storage decision spike completed for the initial Kernel storage lock-in. Decision: use SQLite WAL as first Forge Kernel local authority; keep Dolt as first-class projection/history/branching backend and Beads fidelity oracle, not primary authority now. Evidence recorded in docs/work/2026-06-06-kernel-backlog-memory-roadmap/storage-decision.md and storage-decision-spike.mjs. Dolt server was smoke-tested as reachable via local sql-server, but it adds service/client lifecycle and remains a deferred optional backend spike.

author: Harsha Nanda
text: Created deferred follow-up forge-2agy.9.1.6 for Dolt server/remotes optional-backend testing. This keeps the immediate storage decision unblocked while preserving Dolt server evaluation.
